examples.title: Pseudocode: RGB to HSI Conversion
examples.description: Conversion from RGB to HSI color model
examples.code:
ALGORITHM RGBtoHSI
INPUT: R, G, B (0-255)
OUTPUT: H (0-360°), S (0-1), I (0-1)

BEGIN
 I = (R + G + B) / 3
 S = 1 - (min(R, G, B) / I)
 θ = cos⁻¹{[(R-G)+(R-B)] / [2√((R-G)²+(R-B)(G-B))]}
 IF B ≤ G THEN
 H = θ
 ELSE
 H = 360° - θ
 END IF
END
examples.explanation: Step-by-step pseudocode for converting RGB to HSI color model

examples.title: Python: RGB to HSI Conversion
examples.description: Conversion from RGB to HSI color model
examples.code:
import math

def rgb_to_hsi(r, g, b):
 i = (r + g + b) / 3
 s = 1 - (min(r, g, b) / i)
 theta = math.acos(((r-g)+(r-b)) / (2*math.sqrt((r-g)**2+(r-b)*(g-b))))
 if b <= g:
 h = theta
 else:
 h = 2*math.pi - theta
 h = math.degrees(h)
 return h, s, i

# Test the function
r, g, b = 255, 0, 0
h, s, i = rgb_to_hsi(r, g, b)
print(f"Hue: {h:.2f}°, Saturation: {s:.2f}, Intensity: {i:.2f}")
examples.explanation: Python implementation of RGB to HSI conversion
